supersession.negative_case_disposition: core scenario tests assert no workspace, Postgres, or plan_graph_transition workflow state is claimed by PlanningScenario values
supersession.obsolete_assumption: frozen test asserted scenario planning through Postgres workflow services inside the core-owned scenario family
supersession.rationale: Postgres workflow execution is outside the extracted core scenario catalogue
supersession.replacement: core successor tests assert pure scenario catalogue laws; the Postgres workflow law moves to the later operations/contracts batch
